3030290.name: Submarine Survivor
3030290.description:
Dive into the Depths of the Ocean in Submarine Survivor

An exciting "roguelite" action game that will challenge your strategic skills and reflexes. Pilot a submarine and face hordes of sea creatures as you make your way through various challenges and survive.

Exploration and Survival

Face waves of sea creatures in a dark and mysterious ocean. Each run offers a map with mission nodes that you must complete before facing the final boss.

Roguelite With Short Missions

Each mission lasts about 10 minutes, allowing for quick but action-packed gameplay. Your progress is saved between missions, accumulating upgrades and resources to prepare you for the final boss encounter.

Customization and Upgrades

Upgrade and customize your submarines to better suit your playstyle. Learn passive upgrade research, enhance your submarines, and craft equipable items to gain strategic advantages.

Variety Of Submarines

Unlock different submarine models, each with unique characteristics. Upgrade them all and gain benefits for your entire fleet. Master the depths with your favorite submarine!

Difficulty Levels

Adjust the challenge to your skill level by choosing the one that suits you best, but keep in mind that each difficulty boosts the enemies and adds “modifiers” that will completely change how each game is played.

Boss Battles

As you complete missions, your "threat level" will increase, and when it fills up, you'll have attracted the attention of the final boss. You can decide when to face it. Prepare for epic battles that will test your reflexes and strategy.

Crafting System

Collect resources during your explorations to craft powerful items that will help you survive. Upgrade these items and customize their attributes to maximize their combat effectiveness.

Can You Survive the Depths Of the Abyss?
Find out in Submarine Survivor and prove that you are the true master of the oceans!
3030290.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 简体中文, 韩语, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲, 日语, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 俄语
